channel.title: Terminal on Damon Miao
channel.description: Recent content in Terminal on Damon Miao

item.title: My App Was Spinning and I Had No Idea Why — Here's How I Fixed It
item.description:
Learning Log — March 27, 2026

学习日志 — 2026年3月27日

Topic: Fixing the Claude Desktop App & Learning Terminal Basics 主题： 修复 Claude 桌面应用 & 终端基础入门

What Happened Today / 今天发生了什么

Today was a hands-on day. I ran into a real problem with the Claude desktop app and solved it step by step using the terminal. Along the way, I picked up some foundational knowledge about how computers work behind the scenes.
